info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Customer Material API
info.description:
Manage customer-material information records in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_CUSTOMER_MATERIAL_SRV) links customer-specific material numbers and descriptions to internal material numbers. These records support the sales process by mapping customer part numbers to SAP material master records.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of customer material records

request.description: Returns a collection of customer-material information records. Supports filtering by customer number, material, sales organization, and distribution channel.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description: Creates a new customer-material information record linking a customer part number to an internal SAP material number.

item.name: Retrieve a single customer material record

request.description: Returns a single customer-material information record by its composite key.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the customer material record
